items.name_en: 2025 Fall/Winter Collection, the GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This bucket bag features a cotton webbing lining and an internal compartment, offering excellent practicality.
items.name_cn:
2025 Fall/Winter Collection, the GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This bucket bag features a cotton webbing lining and an internal compartment, offering excellent practicality.
Black GG embossed leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Black cotton-linen blend lining
Top handle with hook closure (height: 14 cm)
Also features a D-ring for hanging removable items
Interior: two compartments and a central snap-button compartment
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap (height: 52 cm - 57.5 cm; length: 107 cm - 114 cm)
Magnetic snap-button closure
Model: 815118.
Dimensions: 19 cm (W) x 18 cm (H) x 11 cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.45 kg
Color: Black embossed/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 2025 Spring/Summer Collection Gucci 73 Series draws inspiration from a vintage bucket bag released in the same year as the collection name. This bag interprets the horsebit motif with modern aesthetics. It can be worn crossbody, on the shoulder, or carried as a handbag. Model 833665, Calfskin, Mini size: 18.5x20x8.5
